subcodes.first_line: O Khalil! Upon thee be My glory and the glory of those who have turned towards God, the Lord of all worlds. Verily, We were seated upon [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا خلیل علیک بهائی و بهاء الذین اقبلوا الی الله رب العالمین قد کنا مستویا علی
subcodes.subjects: @power of prayer, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities, @praise and encouragement
